_note: In-cluster access is the testable core. The real workshop grants the session SA a Route-management Role + an observe NetworkPolicy via spec.session.objects, but that block lives in a Helm-templated workshop.yaml the portless deploy can't extract, so on CRC the SA can't create the Route and the NetworkPolicy is absent. Hence route-admitted, netpol-present and egress-blocked are all expect_fail here — they pass on a real/portal deploy where the operator applies session.objects and the platform is air-gapped. Validate on x86.

steps.run: envsubst < hello-dcs.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=150s
